stemHtml: When in contact with Lille Approach on 118.550 MHz, a pilot receives an odd transmission: "One two three four, Lille Approach". What is the reason for this transmission?

options.a: Lille Approach is asking all stations to change frequency to 123.400 MHz.
options.b: Lille Approach has just conducted a test transmission.
options.c: Lille Approach is receiving a call from another station called “One two three four”.
options.d: Lille Approach has just provided a time check to all stations.
